landing.heroHeadline: Request engineering services, compare quotations, and manage delivery in one place.
landing.heroSubtitle: Submit your project, receive competitive quotes from engineering providers, sign agreements, and track execution with clarity.

trustItems.bilingual: English and Arabic with full RTL

request.title: Request
request.summary: Define location, services, and project details.

compare.title: Compare & Agree
compare.summary: Review quotations and sign your agreement.

execute.title: Execute
execute.summary: Track milestones with clear green, amber, or red status.

close.title: Pay & Archive
close.summary: Record payments manually and close the project.

landing.heroSubtitle: Connecting clients with verified engineering professionals to move projects forward with confidence.
landing.heroSocialProofText: across 10 categories, ready for your project
landing.heroTitle: Connect with Licensed Engineering Offices in Saudi Arabia
landing.heroSubtitleLegacy: Submit your project request, compare quotations, sign agreements, and track execution — all in one platform.
landing.workflowDescription: Four clear stages from request to archive — expand any stage to see the detailed steps.
landing.packagesSubtitle: Choose a curated package or select individual services from our catalog of 147 engineering services.
landing.catalogSubtitle: 10 categories covering design, permits, supervision, inspections, and more.
landing.benefitsTitle: Built for clients and engineering offices
landing.benefitsDescription: A single platform to request, quote, deliver, and pay — with transparency at every step.

clientBenefits.label: For clients
clientBenefits.title: Move projects forward with confidence
items: Submit one structured request and receive competitive quotations
Compare scope, price, and payment terms side by side
Track milestones with clear green, amber, and red status updates
Manage agreements, payments, and delivery in one workspace

agencyBenefits.label: For agencies
agencyBenefits.title: Win work and deliver professionally
items: Receive matched project requests from verified clients
Submit structured quotations with scope, deliverables, and terms
Manage active projects, milestones, and payments in one portal
Build credibility through verified registration and delivery history

landing.agenciesDescription: Government-approved engineering offices registered and verified on ENGA.
landing.agenciesEmpty: Approved agencies will appear here as they join the platform.
landing.getStartedDescription: Whether you need engineering services or deliver them — start in minutes.
landing.roleClientDesc: Discover services, submit requests, compare quotes, and track delivery to completion.
landing.roleAgencyDesc: Register your office, receive matched requests, submit quotations, and grow your business.

footer.tagline: Licensed engineering offices · Built for Saudi Arabia

auth.shellTitle: Request, quote, deliver, and pay — in one trusted platform.
auth.shellSubtitle: Built for Saudi Arabia's engineering services ecosystem with verified offices and structured workflows.
auth.accountCreatedMessage: Account created! Check your email and click the confirmation link, then sign in.

errors.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email first. Check your inbox (and spam folder), then try signing in again.
errors.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. If you just signed up, confirm your email first or use the exact password from signup.
errors.alreadyRegistered: This email is already registered. Try signing in instead.
errors.engineerUnavailable: Individual engineer registration is not available at this time.
errors.authUnavailable: Authentication service is unavailable. Please try again later.
